title: Write to the same memory in different always blocks
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.26+50 (git sha1 0f2d226ae, gcc 7.5.0-3ubuntu1~18.04 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

1. download verilog files: https://github.com/liangkangnan/tinyriscv/blob/master/rtl/core/regs.v
2. download verilog files: https://github.com/liangkangnan/tinyriscv/blob/master/rtl/core/defines.v
3. read_verilog regs.v
4. proc
5. hierarchy
6. opt
7. clean
8. write_verilog

### Expected Behavior
```
  reg [31:0] regs [31:0];
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (_02_[31])
      regs[_00_] <= _01_;
  end else if (_05_[31])
      regs[_03_] <= _04_;
  end
```
### Actual Behavior
```
  reg [31:0] regs [31:0];
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (_02_[31])
      regs[_00_] <= _01_;
  end
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (_05_[31])
      regs[_03_] <= _04_;
  end
```
